attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT                             
TRANSACTION_TYPE
,RPO_FLG
,CAST ((WF.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT* -1 * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  
,WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH 
,WF.FISCAL_MTH
,WF.SRC_ENTITY
,WF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  
,WF.PRODUCT_KEY    
,WF.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
,WF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,WF.WEB_ORDER_ID    
,WF.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
,WF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
,WF.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY
,WF.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,WF.SERVICE_FLG     
,WF.CORP_FLG  
,WF.CONTRACT_START_DTM   
,WF.CONTRACT_END_DTM
,WF.CONTRACT_TERM
,WF.CONTRACT_NUM
,WF.ERP_DEAL_ID 
,WF.AUTO_RELEASE_DT 
,WF.FHI_BNI_FLG 
,WF.CISCO_BOOKED_DT 
,WF.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM 
,WF.PROCESS_DT
,WF.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT
,WF.HOLD_FLG  
,WF.EARLY_SHIP_FLG  
,WF.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG
,WF.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT  
,WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY 
,WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WF.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT
,WF.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD  
,WF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE
,WF.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  
,WF.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT 
,WF.DD_FB_SS_CD 
,WF.SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY 
,WF.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID  
,WF.BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM  
,WF.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD  
,WF.INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT
,WF.RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT
,WF.PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT
,WF.RENEWAL_CNT 
,WF.BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT 
,WF.OFFER_TYPE_CD
,WF.BILLING_MODEL_NAME
,WF.SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD
,WF.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD  
,WF.SRC_CANCEL_DTM  
,WF.CHARGE_TYPE_CD  
,WF.ATO_NAME  
,WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT
,WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  
,WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT
,WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT 
,WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 
,WF.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT 
,WF.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT 
,WF.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT
,WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT
,WF.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT  
,WF.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT 
,CAST((WF.DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT* -1 * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT  
,CASE WHEN WF.SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD IN ('Active','Renewed','Not Active','UNKNOWN') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DV_ACTIVE_FLG        
,WF.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID   
,WF.PRED_BDOM AS DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT 
,WF.DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT 
,WF.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG
,ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD
,DV_MILESTONE_START_DT
,DV_MILESTONE_END_DT 
,CAST ((WF.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             ---MODIFIED
,CAST ((WF.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT --MODIFIED 
,CAST((WF.ATTRIBUTION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,8)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT
,CAST((WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALCTN.ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT 
,COALESCE(RPFIN.DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_CX_PRODUCT 
,PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT  
,PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT		
,DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY      
, DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG  
,INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME 
,SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT
,SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT
,TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT
,BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT
,PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM  
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER 
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_SBP_RPO WF
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
	ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT 
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) AS ALLOCATION_PCT 
         FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
         GROUP BY 1,2,3,4 HAVING SUM(ALLOCATION_PCT) <> 0
       ) ALCTN
    ON WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY    
	AND RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT

LEFT JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD FROM 
$$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN GROUP BY 1,2,3)RPFIN 
  ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND RPFIN.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 
WHERE WF.TRANSACTION_TYPE IN ('SBP_ACCRUALS')

SELECT
TRANSACTION_TYPE              ,
RPO_FLG                       ,
CAST ((WF.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT * -1 * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          ,
PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH          ,
FISCAL_MTH                    ,
SRC_ENTITY                    ,
SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
WF.PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          ,
WEB_ORDER_ID                  ,
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY         ,
END_CUSTOMER_KEY              ,
SERVICE_FLG                   ,
CORP_FLG                      ,
CONTRACT_START_DTM            ,
CONTRACT_END_DTM              ,
CONTRACT_TERM                 ,
CONTRACT_NUM                  ,
ERP_DEAL_ID                   ,
AUTO_RELEASE_DT               ,
FHI_BNI_FLG                   ,
CISCO_BOOKED_DT               ,
ORACLE_BOOK_DTM               ,
PROCESS_DT                    ,
SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT             ,
HOLD_FLG                      ,
EARLY_SHIP_FLG                ,
SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG      ,
CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT        ,
ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        ,
DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD             ,
DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD         ,
DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT      ,
DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        ,
PL_CONVERSION_RATE            ,
DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM  ,
DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT ,
DD_FB_SS_CD                   ,
SUBSCRIPTION_LINE_TSV_KEY     ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
BK_EXAAS_SUBSCR_NUM           ,
SUBSCRIPTION_STATUS_CD        ,
INITIAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
RENEWAL_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
PREPAID_TERM_MTHS_CNT         ,
RENEWAL_CNT                   ,
BILLED_DAY_OF_THE_MTH_INT     ,
OFFER_TYPE_CD                 ,
BILLING_MODEL_NAME            ,
SUBSCR_LINE_STATUS_CD         ,
SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD           ,
SRC_CANCEL_DTM                ,
CHARGE_TYPE_CD                ,
ATO_NAME                      ,
DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  ,
DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT   ,
DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT     ,
WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          ,
DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT ,
DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT       ,
DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT            ,
DV_WATERFALL_START_DT         ,
DV_WATERFALL_END_DT           ,
DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT    ,
DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT   ,
DV_ACTIVE_FLG                 ,
DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID           ,
DV_PREDICTED_MONTH_BILL_DT    ,
DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT        ,
CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG          ,
BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD AS DV_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD     ,  
DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,
DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
CAST ((WF.DV_ORDER_QUANTITY * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY             ,
CAST ((WF.DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT  ,
CAST ((WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT            ,
CAST ((WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT * CAST (COALESCE(ALLOCATION_PCT,1) AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS DECIMAL (26,7)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  ,     
COALESCE(RPFIN.DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_CX_PRODUCT ,
PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT  ,
PERIODIC_BILLING_END_DT	,	
DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY   ,         
DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG , /* added as part of dec release */
INVOICE_RELEASE_DATE_SOURCE_NAME ,
SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_START_DT,
SUBSCRIPTION_CHARGE_CYCLE_END_DT,
TOTAL_ORDER_VALUE_LOCAL_AMT,
BALANCE_LOCAL_AMOUNT,
DV_BALANCE_USD_AMOUNT,
PROJECTED_LOCAL_AMOUNT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER   
FROM $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_REVENUE_ACRL_RPO WF
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFM
	ON RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH
   INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
         DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
         FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
         GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
       ) ALCTN
    ON WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY    
	AND RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = ALCTN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT
LEFT JOIN (SELECT ITEM_KEY,DV_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID,DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD FROM 
 $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN GROUP BY 1,2,3)RPFIN 
  ON RPFIN.ITEM_KEY=WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
 AND RPFIN.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 
WHERE WF.TRANSACTION_TYPE NOT IN ('ERP_ACCRUALS')
